rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the IsUnipotent and ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup problems, but Review 2 additionally catches that AffineAlgGroup bundles finiteType and geomReduced — directly visible in the diff at lines 34-38 — which Review 1 explicitly endorses as sound. Acting on Review 1 leaves that bundling flaw in place; acting on Review 2 fixes it, yielding a better-structured PR.
